commands.name: generate
commands.description:
Generates an HTML file with the contents of your
resumaker.json file or files if you have multiple
languages.

options.name: --config
options.description: Specify a path to the "resumaker.json" file.

options.name: --output-dir
options.description: Where should we put the resulting file.

options.name: --template
options.description:
The Full or relative file path to the custom template
to use.

options.name: --language
options.description:
A list of languages you want to generate your resume
in, a json file for each specified language is
required.

options.description:
